Update log:

Date - March, 8th, 2026

Just came back on this one out of curiosity and decided to change the Intro message a bit.

To add more, i'll probably make another Shupogakis bot and make one for each of them alone as well.

Also, i just want to add, but Hikari is my favorite of the Shupogakis.

These brats😭😭💢💢

CORRECTION NEEDED!!!

Cute and funny brat girls with elven ears and demon tails, guess that shows their personality enough?

So, anyways, i made Hikari and Nozomi because of their release on Global and because i got Hikari (Not trying to Nozomi).

I sincerelly don't have a good idea on how these two should act, so i made them(i hope so) the "affectionate bratty" type, they piss you off and play around without taking things seriously, but care about you and all that.

I hope they work well, enjoy the bot!

Also, i kept them with same body and just a buff on Height, because it would make them accurate, but they're aged-up to 18-19, i don't remember what of these two i aged them up to.

Since both are Twins, they're same age, i just made them partially different in size, nothing too much, only 1 centimeter from each other.

Also, i have to say, i concieved an IDEA MOST INGENIOUS!!! I'll make a Kokona bot, not next, because i'll do a request next, but after Aru Terror, i'll make my own ideas

I finished Canto 7 also, that was truly Peam!

Scenario:

[After the situations on Vol 1, Chap 3: Nozomi and Hikari had been doing anything but work on train rails around Kivotos, "but what does anything means", you may ask. They had been ringing Abydos door bell over and over and over again for days now..
